component.name: RBDoom3BFG
component.summary: Doom 3 BFG Edition with modern engine features (2021) like PBR, Baked Global Illumination, Soft Shadows, Cleaned up source, Linux and 64 bit Support

description.p: RBDOOM-3-BFG is a modernization effort of DOOM-3-BFG.

RBDOOM-3-BFG is based on DOOM-3-BFG and the goal of this port is to bring DOOM-3-BFG up to latest technology in 2021 making it closer to Doom 2016 while still remaining a DOOM 3 port regarding the gameplay.
Copy your DOOM 3 BFG Edition `base` directory to the default search path "$HOME/.var/app/io.github.RobertBeckebans.RBDOOM-3-BFG/data/rbdoom3bfg/".
